metadata.description: Claude Code workflow plugin providing agents, skills, commands, and references for structured AI-assisted development.

plugins.name: backend-dev
plugins.description: NestJS backend development with TypeORM, Passport, Swagger integration.

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Commits Git changes following Conventional Commits rules with commitlint validation.

plugins.name: doc-update
plugins.description: CODEMAPS and HUMANMAPS auto-generation from service code structure.

plugins.name: frontend-dev
plugins.description: Next.js frontend development with React hooks, state management, and API integration.

plugins.name: guard-e2e-test
plugins.description: Full-flow E2E Playwright test generation traversing multiple routes and states.

plugins.name: help-try
plugins.description: FAQ-style answers for try-claude setup, init/migration, runtime structure, and MCP policies.

plugins.name: init-coding-rules
plugins.description: Dynamic generation of ESLint, commitlint, husky, lint-staged, and TSConfig based on coding-rules.

plugins.name: init-try
plugins.description: Bootstrap the repo-local try-claude runtime under .claude/try-claude and seed managed references.

plugins.name: migration
plugins.description: Sync repo-local managed references with latest plugin defaults using SHA256 hash comparison.

plugins.name: planner-lite
plugins.description: Lightweight task planning with structured phase breakdown and dependency analysis.

plugins.name: playwright-test-generator
plugins.description: Automated Playwright test generation from E2E test plans.

plugins.name: playwright-test-healer
plugins.description: Auto-heal failing Playwright tests by analyzing errors and updating selectors.

plugins.name: playwright-test-planner
plugins.description: Plan E2E test scenarios with structured test case design and coverage analysis.

plugins.name: pr
plugins.description: Creates GitHub Pull Requests with structured body, template support, and branch safety guards.

plugins.name: ui-publish
plugins.description: UI/UX component creation with layout-first approach, Tailwind CSS, and design system adherence.
